title: Incorrect sorting when a column uses BINARY collation in the ORDER BY, but is constrained by an == with a different collation in the WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(b VARCHAR(255), c INT);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE b='abc' ORDER BY CONVERT(b USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_bin;
key_bug_features: Sorting issue with BINARY collation in ORDER BY clause
